Metadata.title: ITQAN — Islamic Learning Platform
Metadata.description: Read, study, and reflect on the Quran with translations, bookmarks, and reading progress.

Home.title: Read the Quran with clarity and calm
Home.subtitle: Uthmani script, trusted translations, and a reading experience built to help you focus.

Login.title: Welcome back
Login.subtitle: Log in to continue your reading.

Signup.title: Create your account
Signup.subtitle: Track your reading progress and bookmarks.
Signup.checkEmail: Check your email to confirm your account.

Collections.title: Hadith
Collections.subtitle: Ten classical collections, in the original Arabic with English translation.

Sections.subtitle: Choose a chapter to start reading.

Assistant.title: Assistant
Assistant.disclaimer: An educational study aid, not a substitute for a qualified scholar. It won't issue religious rulings, and for exact Quran or Hadith wording, always check the Quran and Hadith sections of this app.
Assistant.emptyState: Ask about a concept, request a quiz, or paste a passage to review.
Assistant.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
Assistant.notConfiguredTitle: The assistant isn't set up yet
Assistant.notConfiguredDescription: An administrator needs to configure an API key before this feature is available.

Tafsir.error: Couldn't load the tafsir. Please try again.

Common.errorDescription: We couldn't load this content. Please check your connection and try again.
Common.shortPassword: Password must be at least 8 characters

Dashboard.title: Your dashboard
Dashboard.noBookmarksDescription: Bookmark verses while reading to find them here.
